prestazioni: Engine swap to a **SR20DET (Red Top, 205hp stock)** with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** (0.86 A/R, 60 trim) paired with a **Tomei 264°/260° camshaft set** and **JUN forged pistons (87mm, 8.5:1 CR)** for 400whp on E85 fuel. Supporting mods include a **N1 oil pump**, **Tomei Type-S head gasket**, and **HKS 272 fuel pump** with **ID1000 injectors**.

Full **Nismo 5-speed transmission (RNN14 GTi-R spec)** with **PPG straight-cut 1st/2nd gears**, **OS Giken twin-plate clutch**, and **Nismo 2-way LSD (2.5 ratio)**. Drivetrain reinforced with **Nismo R200 differential mount** and **Cusco 8-point subframe brace**.

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Nissan B14-specific valving)**, **Cusco front strut tower bar (RNN13 Presea-specific)**, **Nismo rear upper control arms (polyurethane bushings)**, and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (22mm)**. Braking upgraded to **Endless CC-R6 rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear)** with **AP Racing CP5556-2600 calipers** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Presea (RNN13) widebody kit** with **custom carbon fiber front splitter (3D-scanned for RNN13 bumper)** and **Voltex Type-3 rear wing (1,200mm, 3D-printed mounts)**. Full **Seibon carbon fiber hood (RNN13-specific, 5kg weight reduction)** with **custom NACA ducts** for SR20DET intercooler routing.

**Work Meister S1 3P 16x9 +30 wheels** (ET30, 5x114.3) wrapped in **Yokohama ADVAN A052 225/45/16 tires** (stretched fitment). Fender flares rolled with **custom inner liner delete** and **polyurethane fender liners** for aggressive camber (4° front, 3.5° rear).

**Full interior strip** with **Recaro SRD (RNN13-specific mounts)** and **Takata Drift II harnesses (4-point, bolt-in)**. **Nismo S-Tune gauge cluster (SR20DET-specific)** with **Defi Advance BF gauges (oil temp, boost, AFR)**. **Custom roll cage (8-point, TIG-welded, RNN13 chassis gusseted)** with **Sparco Pro2000 seats (red Alcantara, FIA-approved)** and **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, quick-release)**.
